capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复交易“破位后反抽原支撑/通道下沿变阻力”：如 [2025-02-26] “check out the reaction at the underside of that just broken trendline - $SPX”、[2025-06-13] “$QQQ failing at the underside of former channel support”、[2024-07-31] “Underside of the former support line...in $ES_F”。
[2025-05-15] 直接写 “$UNH almost with a perfect 61.8% absolute retracement”；[2024-03-26] 又写 “wave 5 = 61.8% of waves 1-3...this is a common relationship”，说明他经常用斐波那契比例做定位。
[2024-07-30] “$TLT coiled heading into FOMC and NFP. Coiled markets lead to breakouts and trends.” 这是典型低波动压缩后等方向选择的框架。
[2024-11-14] “$XBI doing breakout folks dirty” 明确是在抓假突破；[2024-03-20] “now that stops are wiped let's see if the trap door can open on the downside” 也体现先扫突破盘/止损再反向。
[2024-03-20] “now that stops are wiped let's see if the trap door can open on the downside” 明确是先扫止损流动性再看真实方向。
[2024-09-27] “$TLT with some 50 day avg love”；[2024-02-26] 关于 $URA 写 “indicator tends to turn up between 30 and 40 during uptrends...VWAP...along with the January low”，说明他在趋势内等回踩均线/VWAP/支撑再续涨。
他经常把美元、债券、股票、BTC 放在同一个风险偏好框架中：[2026-01-29] “$BTCUSD action isn't supportive of US stocks”；[2026-02-18] “Stocks yet to get the memo but stocks are usually the last to know.”
[2025-03-26] “$NVDA relative to $SPY - kind of needs to hold here or risk of a double top increases” 直接用双顶作为反转风险框架。
[2024-05-30] “$DBC - I love the setup...possible double bottom, trendline break...” 说明他会把双底和趋势线突破组合使用。
[2025-03-26] 在讨论 $NVDA relative to $SPY 时明确提到 “especially in light of the recent 'death cross'”。
[2026-02-25] “$PLTR 50/200 day cross”；[2024-05-30] “5 and 200 day about to cross”，说明均线交叉是他确认趋势切换的工具之一。
[2025-06-13] “$SPX weekly doji alert” 直接把十字星当作关键位行为变化提醒。
[2024-02-27] “keep an eye on gold - it's flagging which sets up for a potentially explosive move” 是典型旗形/整理后突破思路。
[2026-04-08] “this is a trading market imo so operate accordingly.” 说明他会先做环境分类，不把所有行情都按趋势延续处理。
虽然不是只盯 BTC，但他长期把美元指数作为风险资产头寸的关键前置变量：[2024-05-30] “one of the most important charts out there right now is $DXY”；[2026-04-01] “This has been so clean and clear $DXY”。
[2024-07-30] “$TLT coiled heading into FOMC and NFP” 说明他明确围绕宏观事件窗口预期波动与方向选择。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: RSI Range Profile
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: RSI 区间画像 / Range Rules
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Classify trend quality by RSI behavior across swings: bullish profiles hold RSI lows around 30-40 and bearish profiles cap RSI rallies near 60-70; use the profile to buy pullbacks or fade rallies.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过 RSI 在不同摆动中的运行区间判断趋势质量：强势上升里 RSI 常在 30-40 一带止跌回升，弱势下跌里 RSI 常在 60-70 一带见顶回落；据此做回踩延续或反弹卖出。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-02-12] “Technically, the daily RSI profile for $TLT is bullish.”；[2024-02-26] “as per RSI range rules, the indicator tends to turn up between 30 and 40 during uptrends.”；[2025-07-16] “a + RSI profile”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Futures-Cash Non-Confirmation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When futures print a new high but the underlying cash index does not confirm, treat it as a late-stage exhaustion / turning-point warning.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当股指期货创新高但现货指数不确认时，视为行情末端衰竭或拐点预警。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-05-29] “new high in futures but not in cash is something you see at turns $ES_F $SPX”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Gap Fill Magnet
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track unfilled price gaps as tactical magnets or barriers; use gap-fill completion or failure as a behavior-change trigger.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把未回补缺口视为短中期价格磁吸位或阻力/支撑位，并把“回补完成/无法回补”作为行为切换信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-01-22] “no gap fill for you $SPX”；[2026-03-27] “Gap fill $SPX”；[2024-12-20] “$DJIA election gap fill”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Relative Ratio Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use ratio charts between sectors/countries and benchmark indices to detect rotation earlier than absolute-price charts.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过板块/国家资产对基准指数的比价图，先于绝对价格发现资金轮动与领导权切换。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-09-18] “$GDX / $SPY breaking out”；[2025-01-30] “$SPY / $ILF - bigger reversal underway in US / Latin America?”；[2024-11-27] “The $FXI / $SPY ratio chart is interesting too”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Elliott Wave Equality / Wave 5 Thrust
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 艾略特波浪等长与第 5 浪冲刺
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Project wave targets using common Elliott relationships such as wave 5 equaling 61.8% of waves 1-3, and identify terminal thrusts in wave 5 for risk-off or reversal timing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用常见波浪比例关系投射目标，例如第 5 浪约等于前 1-3 浪的 61.8%，并把第 5 浪冲刺视为末端风险或反转计时工具。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-03-26] “in $QQQ wave 5 = 61.8% of waves 1-3...this is a common relationship”；[2026-03-20] “a wave 5 thrust in $DXY should complete 'risk-off'”。

personal_quirks.quote: new high in futures but not in cash is something you see at turns
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 期货与现货不确认时，优先考虑拐点而不是追随表面创新高。

personal_quirks.quote: Coiled markets lead to breakouts and trends.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 压缩环境不是噪音，而是趋势发动前的能量储备。

personal_quirks.quote: now that stops are wiped let's see if the trap door can open on the downside
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先观察流动性清扫，再判断是否进入真正的方向性释放。

personal_quirks.quote: this is a trading market imo so operate accordingly.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先判定市场所处 regime，再决定该用趋势策略还是交易区间策略。
没有到触发位就不抢跑，宁可错过一段也不提前下注。

unique_traits: 他不是单纯画线的 TA 交易员，而是把趋势线、通道、缺口、均线、RSI 画像、波浪比例和跨资产宏观联动揉成一个统一框架。和很多只讲加密的人不同，他明显从美元、利率、股票指数、国家 ETF、商品和相对强弱比价去做上层判断，再把具体入场落到图形与关键位反应上。另一个鲜明特点是非常重视“非确认”“假突破”“扫止损后反向”这些拐点行为，而不是机械追突破。
